channel.title: Doctrine and Covenants
channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
channel.itunes:summary: Personal feed for Eric Wilde — official chapter-by-chapter audio of the Doctrine and Covenants, streamed from the Church's CDN. Audio © Intellectual Reserve, Inc.; for personal study.
channel.description: Chapter-by-chapter audio of the Doctrine and Covenants, from the official Church CDN. Personal use only.

item.title: Title
item.description: Doctrine and Covenants — Title. Read aloud from the official audio recording of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
item.itunes:subtitle: Doctrine and Covenants
item.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

item.title: Introduction — Testimony of the Twelve Apostles
item.description: Doctrine and Covenants — Introduction — Testimony of the Twelve Apostles. Read aloud from the official audio recording of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
item.itunes:summary: Doctrine and Covenants — Introduction — Testimony of the Twelve Apostles
item.itunes:subtitle: Doctrine and Covenants
item.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
